content: I will execute the `multi_replace_file_content` tool to apply our 5 targeted UI updates inside `settings_detail.tsx`. This will dynamically load temple designations, remove the spelling redundancy "Gotra Chanting & Chanting", pre-fetch the dynamic temple catalog in parallel, and keep translations in sync across all languages.
thinking:
**Focusing on Orders State**

I'm now zeroing in on managing the orders state, specifically considering 'active', 'past', and 'store' order types. I've set up `useState` hooks for `ordersTab`, `orders`, and `loadingOrders`, and I am ready to integrate a `user` state.

args.Description: "Added dynamic temple association resolving, replaced redundant 'Gotra Chanting & Chanting' string with customized multi-language translations, and integrated parallel pre-fetching of website pooja products temple associations in settings_detail.tsx."
args.Instruction: "Declare state and helper mappings at the top, pre-fetch pooja products temple associations in parallel, resolve temple names in active and past cards, and clean up the chanting label redundancy."
